problem id: 3fd617e5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00101011 -> 10110111
  00010010 -> 01111011
  10000001 -> 00011111
  11101011 -> 10001111
  10110010 -> 01011011
  10111110 -> 01011011
  01101100 -> 11100110
  01010100 -> 11101111
  01111011 -> 10100111
  01111000 -> 11100111

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 00001111
